title: jLevels
body:
# A minecraft leveling Plugin
### Custom XP formula | Highly Configurable | PlaceholderAPI Support | Level colours


**Early Access: Features are still very limited!**


<details>
<summary>Get XP on following Events</summary>

* Monster Kill
* Advacement
* Player Kill

more comming soon!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>

* `/level` - See your level
* `/addxp <player> <xp> [reason]` - Add xp to a player
* `/givexpbottle <player <xp> <amount>` - Gives you a xp bottle which you can right-click
* `/jreload` - Reload the config
* `/setlevel <player> <level>` - Set the level of a player

</details>


<details>
<summary>Supported Languages</summary>

* English
* German
* French _(translated by [MathiasDPX](https://github.com/MathiasDPX))_

**If you want to translate the plugin into your own language, please make a pull request on [Github](https://github.com/JoJjjo174/jlevels)**

</details>



<details>
<summary>PlaceholderAPI Placeholders</summary>

* `%jlevels_level%` - get a player's level
* `%jlevels_xp` - get a player's xp
* `%jlevels_required` - get a player's required xp to level up

</details>



Set commands to execute on level up in the config

Set level colours in the config

Set maximum level in the config

**Tutorial** _(for outdated version!)_
